main.name: Shuang Chen
main.description: , with hands-on experience building scalable web applications, AI integrations, and cloud-based solutions. Proficient in React, Angular, Node.js, Python, Java, SQL/NoSQL databases, and microservices architecture.
main.bio: I am Shuang Chen, a passionate software engineer with expertise in full-stack development and AI-driven solutions. Always open to learning new technologies and innovating in cloud computing and AI-enhanced applications.
main.contactmessage: Feel free to drop me an email about software development opportunities! Actively seeking new challenges.

resume.skillmessage: Full-stack development | AI & Cloud Integration | System Design & Architecture

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Technology
education.description: Merit-based scholarship recipient, GPA 3.85. Key courses: Database Development, Machine Learning for Business, System Design, Algorithms & Data Structures.

education.school: East China University of Science And Technology
education.description: Three-year scholarship recipient, captain of the tennis team. Worked across multiple industries, including e-commerce, education, consulting, and IT.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Developed and deployed an AI-driven chatbot for Intel's Maestro system, enabling efficient customer support. Led the migration of Intel's hardware management system to the U.S., optimizing remote device control. Built microservices-based backend solutions using Python, Node.js, and Java, integrated with AI-powered tools for enhanced development productivity.

work.title: Senior UI Developer
work.description: Led UI design and development for major financial product lines using Angular and Vue.js. Implemented AI-based testing with Applitools and Cypress, enhancing development efficiency. Developed reusable components and modernized legacy applications for better performance and maintainability.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Developed microservices and micro-frontend applications for Verizon’s 5G business. Designed and optimized backend APIs using Node.js and Java Spring Boot. Implemented GraphQL-based authentication and role-based access control for enhanced security.

projects.title: AI-Powered Maestro Chatbot
projects.category: An AI chatbot for Intel’s hardware management system, providing automated support and remote device control.

projects.title: TDM One Source - Capital One
projects.category: An internal testing platform for managing credit card rewards and adjustments, built with Angular and integrated with AI testing frameworks.

testimonials.text: Ever tried. Ever failed. No matter. Try again. Fail again. Fail better.
